schemas.languages:
CREATE TABLE languages (
    language_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    iso639_3 TEXT,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    family TEXT,
    branch TEXT,
    parent_language_id TEXT,
    family_node_id TEXT,
    branch_node_id TEXT,
    parent_node_id TEXT,
    aliases_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    common_words_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL
)
schemas.language_aliases:
CREATE TABLE language_aliases (
    alias_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    language_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    alias TEXT NOT NULL,
    normalized_form TEXT,
    alias_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    script_id TEXT,
    region_hint TEXT,
    source_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_ref TEXT,
    confidence REAL NOT NULL,
    notes TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL
)
schemas.language_variants:
CREATE TABLE language_variants (
    variant_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    language_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    variant_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    variant_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    region_hint TEXT,
    script_id TEXT,
    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'documented',
    mutual_intelligibility REAL,
    notes TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL
)
schemas.phrase_translations:
CREATE TABLE phrase_translations (
    phrase_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    canonical_key TEXT NOT NULL,
    language_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    text_value TEXT NOT NULL,
    register TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general',
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL
)
schemas.pronunciation_profiles:
CREATE TABLE pronunciation_profiles (
    profile_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    language_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    profile_kind TEXT NOT NULL,
    romanization_scheme TEXT,
    ipa_hint TEXT,
    examples_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    notes TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL
)
schemas.phonology_profiles:
CREATE TABLE phonology_profiles (
    profile_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    language_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    notation_system TEXT NOT NULL,
    broad_ipa TEXT,
    stress_policy TEXT,
    syllable_template TEXT,
    examples_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    notes TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL
)
schemas.transliteration_profiles:
CREATE TABLE transliteration_profiles (
    profile_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    language_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_script TEXT NOT NULL,
    target_script TEXT NOT NULL,
    scheme_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    coverage TEXT NOT NULL,
    example_in TEXT,
    example_out TEXT,
    notes TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL
)
schemas.language_capabilities:
CREATE TABLE language_capabilities (
    capability_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    language_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    capability_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    maturity TEXT NOT NULL,
    confidence REAL NOT NULL,
    provider TEXT NOT NULL,
    notes TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL
)
schemas.scripts:
CREATE TABLE scripts (
    script_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    unicode_ranges_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL
)
schemas.source_weights:
CREATE TABLE source_weights (
    source_name TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    authority_weight REAL NOT NULL,
    notes TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL
)
schemas.self_fill_release_runs:
CREATE TABLE self_fill_release_runs (
    release_run_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    mode TEXT NOT NULL,
    manifest_path TEXT,
    signature_path TEXT,
    ledger_path TEXT,
    archive_path TEXT,
    summary_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL
)
schemas.self_fill_release_artifacts:
CREATE TABLE self_fill_release_artifacts (
    artifact_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    release_run_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    artifact_kind TEXT NOT NULL,
    file_path TEXT NOT NULL,
    sha256 TEXT NOT NULL,
    bytes_size INTEGER NOT NULL,
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (release_run_id) REFERENCES self_fill_release_runs(release_run_id)
)
schemas.self_fill_rollback_index:
CREATE TABLE self_fill_rollback_index (
  rollback_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  release_run_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  retention_class TEXT NOT NULL,
  replay_priority INTEGER NOT NULL,
  manifest_path TEXT NOT NULL,
  archive_path TEXT NOT NULL,
  ledger_path TEXT NOT NULL,
  manifest_sha256 TEXT NOT NULL,
  index_path TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(release_run_id) REFERENCES self_fill_release_runs(release_run_id)
)
